objective: Raise LifeMax from a form-driven local demo toward a higher-level daily operating loop by adding a browser-local day review synthesis and repairing a mobile app-shell layout defect.
approvalStatus: Production deployment was previously approved in this goal with PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote. No credential, auth setting, DNS, backend, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, or WHOOP mutation was approved or performed.
preActionEvidence: Lab preflight was red at 2026-06-20T05:43:19.944Z, so backend/shared-context readiness could not be claimed.
Live Patterns page before repair had no day-review synthesis and the mobile screenshot showed content squeezed by the hidden desktop side-nav grid column.
Clean repo origin/main matched 7a62d268259ab95b195f6ad585b5fea209cb859b before the product repair.
rollbackPath: Revert ba63df1b3c97f6e32d32ee06f2566fc6abe779a0 and the proof commit, then redeploy the previous Vercel production commit. The change only touches browser-local state, CSS, and tests; no backend or external records are mutated.
changedState: origin/main pushed to ba63df1b3c97f6e32d32ee06f2566fc6abe779a0 for the product repair
Vercel production dpl_9CEM53wjg65K7oET99k8cUbNtTat reached READY for lifemax-web
life-max-omega production inspected READY at dpl_5188AkHv81B5ikLHd4umag1uWCkP
postActionEvidence: Local Playwright smoke saved a review checkpoint, verified Profile Review saved, and confirmed export preview contains reviewed_at.
Live browser smoke passed on https://lifemax-web.vercel.app/patterns and https://life-max-omega.vercel.app/patterns.
Production smoke measured main content width at 390px on a 390px viewport and found no horizontal overflow or runtime errors.
Focused screenshots were captured for the local and deployed day-review panels.
verification: npm run test: pass, 3 files and 10 tests
npm run test:fixtures: pass, 1 file and 2 tests
npm run test:pwa: pass, 1 file and 1 test
npm run screenshot:mobile: pass, production build plus 2 Playwright tests
live browser smoke on lifemax-web and life-max-omega: pass
truth_boundary: This proof covers browser-local product behavior only.
The review is derived from local check-in, plan, capture, evening close, pattern decision, and experiment state.
It is not AI coaching, medical guidance, WHOOP analysis, account sync, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, or backend persistence.
The LifeMax lab preflight and boot packet remained red at the start of this cycle, so daily shared-context readiness is not claimed.
defects_found: After a full local day, Patterns still showed only weak pattern cards and action buttons; there was no synthesis artifact that helped the user review the day or decide the next cautious move.
The mobile shell reserved the desktop side-navigation grid column even when the side nav was hidden, squeezing main content into roughly half of the 390px viewport.
The existing horizontal-overflow checks did not detect the squeezed mobile layout because the page did not overflow; it was simply too narrow.
The first new Profile test assertion for Review saved status was ambiguous because multiple local summary tiles legitimately said saved.
Full-page screenshots with the sticky top bar created confusing proof artifacts, so the day-review proof screenshot needed a focused element capture.

repairs_made.summary: Added reviewed_at local state, a derived DayReview model, export summary review status, and localStorage normalization for older state.
Added the Patterns Local day review panel and Save/Update review checkpoint action, which persists a pattern-sourced memory candidate and review timestamp.
Added Review status to the Profile local data summary.
Fixed mobile app-shell layout by using a single-column workspace below the desktop breakpoint and restoring the side-nav grid only at desktop width.
Added unit assertions for locked and ready day-review derivation plus export review status.
Added browser coverage for review save, export reviewed_at, mobile content width, and a focused day-review screenshot artifact.

git.code_commit_subject: feat: add local day review checkpoint
git.push_status: origin/main matched local main after product commit push

commands_run.summary: Lab preflight still failed local MCP health/fetch and did not load life safety or Grok context state.
Boot packet remained not safe to claim daily usability; this proof stays browser-local.
Next production build plus Playwright mobile/desktop smoke passed: 2 tests.
No value-shaped credential patterns were found in changed files before the product commit.
Linked project production deployment dpl_9CEM53wjg65K7oET99k8cUbNtTat reached READY and was aliased to lifemax-web.vercel.app.
Omega public production alias was READY at deployment dpl_5188AkHv81B5ikLHd4umag1uWCkP.

flow: verified mobile main content width is greater than 340px at a 390px viewport

loop_evidence.cycle_hypothesis: A local day review and mobile shell-width repair will make the app feel more like a useful private operating loop and less like a static form/card demo.
checks_rerun_after_repair: live browser smoke on both production aliases
loop_evidence.stop_continue_decision: checkpoint, not complete: the browser-local app now has a stronger review loop and repaired mobile layout, but full LifeMax backend/shared-context/Wave 1 readiness remains red and unproved.

residual_risks: The review is local deterministic synthesis, not AI or wearable analysis.
The app still does not connect WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, or backend writes.
Preview deployments may still be protected by Vercel login; public proof uses production aliases.
Screenshots are local ignored artifacts and are not tracked in git.
The lab repo is dirty and its shared-context boot/preflight state remains red; this run did not mutate or repair that backend/control-plane lane.
